"use client"

import * as React from "react"
import * as SliderPrimitive from "@radix-ui/react-slider"
import { tw } from "~/tw";

const Slider = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof SliderPrimitive.Root>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof SliderPrimitive.Root>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <SliderPrimitive.Root
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.def([className], {
        position: "relative",
        display: "flex",
        width: "w-full",
        touchAction: "touch-none",
        userSelect: "select-none",
        alignItems: "items-center",
    })}
    {...props}
  >
    <SliderPrimitive.Track className={tw.style({
            position: "relative",
            height: "h-1.5",
            width: "w-full",
            flexGrow: "grow",
            overflow: "overflow-hidden",
            borderRadius: "rounded-full",
            backgroundColor: "bg-primary/20",
        }).class()}>
      <SliderPrimitive.Range className={tw.style({
                position: "absolute",
                height: "h-full",
                backgroundColor: "bg-primary",
            }).class()} />
    </SliderPrimitive.Track>
    <SliderPrimitive.Thumb className={tw.style({
            display: "block",
            height: "h-4",
            width: "w-4",
            borderRadius: "rounded-full",
            borderWidth: ["border", "border-primary/50"],
            backgroundColor: "bg-background",
            boxShadow: "shadow",
            transitionProperty: "transition-colors",
            "focus-visible": {
                outlineStyle: "focus-visible:outline-none",
                boxShadow: ["focus-visible:ring-1", "focus-visible:ring-ring"],
            },
            disabled: {
                pointerEvents: "disabled:pointer-events-none",
                opacity: "disabled:opacity-50",
            },
        }).class()} />
  </SliderPrimitive.Root>
))
Slider.displayName = SliderPrimitive.Root.displayName

export { Slider }
